# `pressBack`

Navigates back one screen. On Android this is the system back button; on
iOS Maestro simulates a back swipe from the left edge. Use `wait`
afterward if the app is loading a new screen.

## Source

- Kind: YAML-defined
- Tool id: `pressBack`
